name: HazardFootprint
author: Flax & Teal Limited
description: A spatialised hazard output in the Aonach Mór resilience demo. Carries a GeoSPARQL geometry, an intensity band, a phenomenon time-span, and a sosa:usedProcedure link back to the HazardModel that produced it. Rooted at prov:Entity so provenance relationships (wasDerivedFrom, wasAttributedTo) are first-class.
